title: Spicy Turkish Pilaf
description: A flavorful and spicy Turkish-inspired pilaf made with mung beans and crispy vegetables.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the mung beans, pilaf mix, garlic, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the mung beans are tender.
Stir in the chopped sprout and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and garnish with chopped parsley.
